C2A Coach View
+ Data Aggregation

Pilot Status Review for NLU
Eric Falke · for Elizabeth Swanson · April 22, 2026
Slide 2 of 11 · Framing

Your four evaluation questions

Everything in this deck maps back to these. Source: our 2026-04-02 memo.

Question 1
Does the assessment change student self-understanding?
Question 2
Does the coach use the profile to do something different?
Question 3
Does C2A evidence actually reach the coaching conversation?
Question 4
What patterns emerge across 50 students that Phase 3 should test at scale?
Slide 3 of 11 · What's live today

Phase A: Coach View + Telemetry Foundation

Shipped to main. Representative SHAs below.

A1Schema: c2aAnalyticsEvents, c2aCoachNotes, telemetry columns on responses/sessions, reportFirstViewedAt✓ shipped5e441548 / 8f442e07 A2Analytics events API (POST /api/c2a/analytics/events)✓ shippedbb0e6020 A3Client-side analytics hooks — shipped as unified useAnalyticsTracker.ts (plan called for three separate hooks)✓ shippedbb0e6020 A4Assessment item dwell-time · schema exists but zero writes — client-side timer not wired✗ not shipped— A5Report engagement tracking (page_view, page_exit, accordion_toggle events)✓ shippedbb0e6020 + fb63a0a2 A6Coach View MVP (dashboard, student detail, notes CRUD, timepoint columns, SYSTEM_ADMIN access)✓ shipped313450fb / ff286726 / fec66927

One divergence from plan: three hooks merged into one. One gap: A4 instrumentation drafted in schema but client writes never landed — Phase B candidate.

Slide 4 of 11 · Coach Dashboard

What a coach sees on login

Assigned students, aggregate status cards, full roster with timepoint progress. Data points below were pre-approved in your 2026-04-02 memo.

Coach-level aggregates (top): # assigned · # completed T1 · # viewed report · # needing attention (inactive 7+ days). Per-student row: name · T1/T2/T3 status (Green/yellow/gray) · report viewed Y/N · last active · focus areas · inactivity badge.

Slide 5 of 11 · Coach Student Detail

Click a student → the "big picture across pillars"

Your ask from the April memo. Shows per-skill EF rollup with tier (strength/growing), EF-impact annotations (working_memory, inhibition), timepoint cards, and notes CRUD.

Example student: kwright27@my.nl.edu · completed NLU Pilot T1 · coach sees strengths across pillars plus specific growing areas (communication, networking) with named EF impact.

Slide 6 of 11 · Student Start Here Report

What the student saw · what the coach clicks through to

One-click from the student detail page opens the same mobile report the student received. No separate coach view to maintain.

This is how Question 3 (evidence reaching the conversation) becomes operational: the coach has the exact artifact the student internalized.

Navigation is wired: CoachStudentDetailPage.tsx:187 → /c2a/report/your-profile?studentId=…

Slide 7 of 11 · Admin Roster

Assignment mechanism (ThriveIEP admin)

Coach-to-student assignments live in coach_assignments. Admins see every student; the Coach column reveals current pairings (e.g. my five test assignments — kwright27, slim4, yanderson3, mkhanna2, fcossa1 — all show "Eric Falke").

63 NLU pilot students currently in the roster. Invite status, completion status, org, assigned coach, and timepoint all visible. This is the control surface for onboarding and coach assignment.

Slide 9 of 11 · Next steps · primary lens

Mapped to your four questions

Q1 self-understanding
Phase B post-sprint questionnaire (CES · surprise · "wouldn't have known"). Templates drafted in the PRD, not yet seeded or wired.
Q2 coach does something different
Coach-notes usage data from the already-shipped notes CRUD, plus Phase B advisor check-in (session Y/N · C2A discussed Y/N). Tracks whether the profile changes coach behavior.
Q3 evidence reaches the conversation
Advisor report tracking (B1) — partial (commit 3e44b2b5). Extend to full advisor_report_viewed events. Also depends on A5 accordion data which is already live.
Q4 patterns at 50 students
Phase C NLU Admin dashboard (institution-wide rollup, no raw telemetry). Needs the role-scoped dashboard.ts route the plan deferred to Phase C.
Slide 10 of 11 · PM-honest timeline

Build order after Phase A

Next 2-3 weeks

Phase B · Advisor tracking + feedback

  • B1 advisor_report_viewed events (extends A5)
  • B2 schema: question_sets + feedback_responses
  • B3 questionnaire API
  • B4 four default templates (seeded)
  • B5 QuestionnaireModal UI
Weeks 3-5

Phase C · Admin + staff views

  • C1 NLU admin funnel view
  • C2 ThriveIEP staff full view + CSV export
  • C3 role-scoped dashboard.ts route
Parallel after A

Phase D · Notifications

  • D1 email_sends table
  • D2 notification service (sprint complete, report viewed, inactive 7+ days)
  • D3 admin trigger config

Gaps worth fixing in parallel with Phase B: A4 item timer wiring (schema is ready, one client hook missing).

Slide 11 of 11 · Decisions needed

Where I need you

1. Sign off on the coach data list · Does what's on slides 4 and 5 match the decision-rights you want coaches to have? Anything missing for NLU onboarding?
2. Phase B questionnaire templates · I'd like you to review the four default templates before we seed them: student post-sprint, student post-report, advisor check-in, advisor first-conversation debrief. Session-occurred Y/N and C2A-discussed Y/N remain binary per v4.
3. NLU launch timing · When do we move from this "populated in-flight" view to live pilot? Phase B templates are the gating artifact for Question 1 data.
4. A4 priority call · Item-dwell-time telemetry is scaffolded but not wired. Do you want it wired before NLU launch, or is page-level engagement (A5) enough for Phase 2?
